findings.title: No independent third-party security audit
findings.description: Privacy and fund-handling code has not been reviewed by an independent auditor. Internal review does not substitute for external validation before mainnet real funds.
findings.mitigation: Commission third-party audit of contracts, circuits, scanner, and frontend key handling; attach report to signoff.

findings.title: Groth16 trusted setup uses development ceremony artifacts
findings.description: In-repo zkey files derive from Hermez Phase 1 PTAU with project-specific Phase 2. circuits/README states these are for development only.
findings.mitigation: Run production multi-party ceremony; update artifact hashes and contract embedded VK.

findings.title: Soroban contracts lack formal verification
findings.description: Smart contracts are unit-tested but not formally verified. Admin paths, nullifier growth, and upgrade authority require audit scrutiny.
findings.mitigation: Complete external contract audit; expand unit/integration tests for admin and pause paths.

findings.title: Mainnet multisig governance not yet deployed
findings.description: mainnet.json shows deploymentStatus not_deployed; admin/multisig accounts unset. Single-key admin is unacceptable for mainnet.
findings.mitigation: Deploy with multisig per AdminPanel runbook; record accounts in manifest before production traffic.

findings.title: Ghost ephemeral keys stored plaintext at rest
findings.description: Historical risk: ghost private keys in localStorage without encryption.
findings.mitigation: AES-256-GCM + PBKDF2 (600k iter) encryption in ghostCrypto.ts.

findings.title: Master viewing/spending keys persisted in browser storage
findings.description: Master keys must never persist across sessions.
findings.mitigation: KeysContext keeps masterKeys in memory only; cleared on logout.

findings.title: WASM / circuit artifact drift undetected in CI
findings.description: Undetected artifact substitution could ship malicious scanner or circuit builds.
findings.mitigation: SHA-256 pins in artifacts/manifest.json; CI verify-artifact-manifest and deployment manifest checks.

findings.title: Malformed announcement public keys accepted
findings.description: Invalid secp256k1 keys could cause scanner crashes or spurious matches.
findings.mitigation: Compressed prefix validation in scanner and stealth-announcer (#53).

findings.title: Unsupported announcement event versions processed incorrectly
findings.description: Schema drift could miss or mis-parse announcements.

findings.title: Wallet network mismatch allows wrong-network signing
findings.description: User could sign mainnet txs while UI expects testnet or vice versa.

findings.title: Registration setup signature replay across contexts
findings.description: Setup signatures could be replayed without domain separation.

findings.title: No emergency response for compromised reputation root
findings.description: Compromised root publisher could authorize false claims.
findings.mitigation: Multisig freeze policy, UI blocks, and incident runbook (#85).

findings.title: Legacy devnet/Solana config could reach production builds
findings.description: Stale address JSON or devnet cluster refs could misconfigure mainnet.
findings.mitigation: Manifest-only contract IDs; CI rejects legacy JSON patterns.

findings.title: Decrypted keys exposed in browser memory while app is open
findings.description: Extensions or DevTools can inspect JS heap; fundamental browser limitation.
findings.mitigation: Document in GHOST_THREAT_MODEL; clearGhostPassword on logout; minimize decrypt window.

findings.title: XSS at password entry bypasses ghost encryption
findings.description: Active XSS can capture password before encryption applies.
findings.mitigation: CSP, input sanitization, extension hygiene; documented residual risk.

findings.title: On-chain metadata enables timing and amount linkage
findings.description: Stealth addresses do not hide amounts, fees, or fee-payer identity.
findings.mitigation: User education; threat model documentation; no v1 protocol hiding.
